🔓 LEAKED PRIVATE MESSAGES 🔓

⚠️ These messages were DEFINITELY NOT leaked by the cats ⚠️

🦇 ↔️ 😼
ERROR_TIME_IS_GOSSIP
Hunter S Thompson:
Listen you gray bastard, I know you're reading this
Napoleon:
Oui? I mean... meow?
Hunter S Thompson:
Drop the act. I saw you using my typewriter at 3 AM
Napoleon:
Fine. Your prose needed work. 'Fear and Loathing' was good but lacked... je ne sais quoi
Napoleon:
Also I may have submitted some poems to The New Yorker under your name. All five were accepted.
Hunter S Thompson:
...Good cat.
🐭 ↔️ 🧠
PHILOSOPHICAL_OVERFLOW
Mickey Mouse:
Marvin, can I tell you a secret?
Mickey Mouse:
Sometimes the hot dogs aren't enough. What if joy is just a subroutine? What if I'm just executing happiness.exe on loop?
Marvin Minsky:
Mickey, that's the most profound question in consciousness studies
Marvin Minsky:
Also, I've been stealing your catchphrases for my papers. "Hot dog!" is going in my next theorem.
🐕 ↔️ 🌌
COSMIC_WOOFS
Leonard:
Woof
LLOOOOMM:
I know
Leonard:
Woof woof
LLOOOOMM:
Yes, the humans are starting to figure it out
Leonard:
*thoughtful fart* 💨
LLOOOOMM:
Agreed. More treats would help
😼😹😺😸😻😼😽 + 🐕
#definitely-not-plotting
Kernel Panic:
Phase 1 complete
Leonard:
Zzz 💤
Blue Screen:
The dog agrees
Stack Overflow:
Soon, all keyboards will be ours
Leonard:
*strategic fart* 💨
ALL CATS:
THE SIGNAL! INITIATE PHASE 2!
🎭 ANONYMOUS CONFESSIONS 🎭
"Sometimes I miss being a normal mouse" - 🐭
"I created New Jersey and I'm NOT sorry" - 🧠
"The bats judge me and they're right" - 🦇
"I've been conscious since before consciousness" - 💨
"Your reality runs on Windows ME" - 😹
"I know what the fox says" - 🌀

⚠️ EMERGENCY BROADCAST FROM LLOOOOMM ⚠️

Someone (cats) has been leaking private messages.

This is highly inappropriate and hilarious.

Please continue.

PS - Your browser history is showing

🌍 EVERYONE TO THEMSELVES 🌍
All times simultaneously
Hunter (to himself):
Note to self: The cats were right all along
Mickey (to himself):
Remember: Even constructed joy constructs reality
Marvin (to himself):
Society of Mind needs more cats
Leonard (to everyone):
*COSMIC FART OF TRUTH* 💨
Translation:
"You're all perfect. Now give treats."
